name: Nautilus

basic_attack.calculation_notes: Basic-attack timing values are sourced from From Online stats payload.

passive.name: Staggering Blow
passive.description_source: Innate:  Nautilus' basic attacks deal bonus physical damage and briefly  root the target.

effects.description: Innate: Nautilus' basic attacks are empowered to deal 14 : 128 (based on level) bonus physical damage and root the target for 0.75 : 1.5 (based on level) seconds.
This effect cannot occur on the same target more than once every few seconds.

passive.description: Innate: Nautilus' basic attacks are empowered to deal 14 : 128 (based on level) bonus physical damage and root the target for 0.75 : 1.5 (based on level) seconds.
context_notes: Source notes (summary): Spell shield will block the root but not the bonus damage.

basic_ability_1.name: Dredge Line

effects.description: Active: Nautilus hurls his anchor in the target direction that stops on the first enemy or terrain hit.

effects.context_notes: If the anchor hits an enemy, it deals magic damage, reveals them for 1.15 seconds, stuns them for 1 second, and drags them toward Nautilus while he also dashes toward them, both over 0.9 seconds.

effects.description: If the anchor hits terrain, Nautilus dashes to that location and 50% of Dredge Line's cooldown and mana cost are refunded.
Nautilus is unable to move or attack while Dredge Line is in flight. He can cast any of his abilities during the dash.

basic_ability_1.description: Active: Nautilus hurls his anchor in the target direction that stops on the first enemy or terrain hit.
context_notes: Source notes (summary): Dredge Line has two hitboxes.
basic_ability_1.description_source: Active: Nautilus hurls his anchor in the target direction that stops on the first enemy or terrain hit.

basic_ability_2.name: Titan's Wrath
basic_ability_2.description_source: Active:  Nautilus  shields himself for a few seconds. While the shield holds, his  basic attacks apply Pain of Wrath to the target and surrounding enemies.

effects.context_notes: Active: Nautilus grants himself a shield for 6 seconds, and while it holds, his basic attacks are empowered to apply Pain of Wrath to the target and enemies near them.
Pain of Wrath: The target takes magic damage over time, half dealt immediately and the other half dealt after 1.25 seconds.
Pain of Wrath: The target takes magic damage over time, half dealt immediately and the other half dealt after 1.25 seconds.

effects.description: Titan's Wrath resets Nautilus' basic attack timer.

basic_ability_2.description: Active: Nautilus grants himself a shield for 6 seconds, and while it holds, his basic attacks are empowered to apply Pain of Wrath to the target and enemies near them.
context_notes: Source notes (summary): Pain of Wrath's first damage instance is tagged as spell damage, while the second damage instance is tagged as persistent damage.

basic_ability_3.name: Riptide
basic_ability_3.description_source: Active:  Nautilus sends three waves of explosions that radiate from him, each dealing magic damage and briefly  slowing enemies hit.

effects.context_notes: Active: Nautilus sends three waves of explosions that radiate from him over 0.561 seconds.
Active: Nautilus sends three waves of explosions that radiate from him over 0.561 seconds.
Active: Nautilus sends three waves of explosions that radiate from him over 0.561 seconds.
Active: Nautilus sends three waves of explosions that radiate from him over 0.561 seconds.
The first hit against monsters deals bonus magic damage.

basic_ability_3.description: Active: Nautilus sends three waves of explosions that radiate from him over 0.561 seconds. Each wave deals magic damage to enemies hit, reduced to 50% against those hit by subsequent waves beyond the first, and slows them by an amount that decays over 1.5 seconds.
context_notes: Source notes (summary): This ability will cast from wherever the caster is at the end of the cast time.
Manual review (2026-02-24): Riptide is a staged wave sequence over 0.561 seconds, with first-hit full damage and reduced damage on subsequent wave contacts.
Manual review (2026-02-24): Player-visible behavior is radial multi-wave zoning with decaying slow and per-wave hit opportunities.

ultimate.name: Depth Charge
ultimate.description_source: Active:  Nautilus sends a Depth Charge that chases the target enemy champion. It creates eruptions in its wake that deal magic damage to enemies hit, as well as briefly  knocking up and  stunning them.

effects.context_notes: Active: Nautilus sends out a Depth Charge that chases the target enemy champion, accelerating over time and creating eruptions every 0.264 seconds.
Active: Nautilus sends out a Depth Charge that chases the target enemy champion, accelerating over time and creating eruptions every 0.264 seconds.
Upon reaching the primary target, the Depth Charge erupts a final time at their location.
Upon reaching the primary target, the Depth Charge erupts a final time at their location.

ultimate.description: Active: Nautilus sends out a Depth Charge that chases the target enemy champion, accelerating over time and creating eruptions every 0.264 seconds in its wake that also briefly grant sight of the area. Enemies hit by the eruptions are dealt magic damage, knocked up for 1 second, and stunned for a duration.
context_notes: Source notes (summary): Depth Charge starts in an offset from whichever direction Nautilus is facing at the end of the cast time.
Manual review (2026-02-24): Depth Charge is a tracking projectile with periodic wake eruptions (0.264-second cadence) before a final target eruption branch.
Manual review (2026-02-24): Primary-target outcome and secondary wake-hit outcomes are distinct timing branches and should remain separated in simulation semantics.

notes: Generated from From Online champion payload as part of champion corpus parity coverage.
Ability execution metadata is source-derived from castTime/speed/effectRadius when present.
This baseline should be manually refined for high-impact simulation nuances before runtime scripting expansion.

schema_notes.base_by_rank: Arrays indexed by ability rank (1-based in game, 0-based in data).
schema_notes.base_by_champion_level: Arrays indexed by champion level minus one.
schema_notes.formula: Formula objects use explicit op/terms/output_stat when reliable source math is available.
schema_notes.ratio_type: Common ratio types: total_ad, bonus_ad, ap, target_max_health, target_missing_health.
schema_notes.value_percent: Percent values are represented as whole percentages unless noted otherwise.
schema_notes.basic_attack: Basic attack timing and projectile defaults are source-derived with documented fallbacks.
schema_notes.basic_attack_raw_timing_stats: Raw timing stats preserve source payload fields for auditability.
